task_completion.description: The original landscape image is opened in an image editing application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 800x600 landscape photograph is visible within the workspace of a GUI image editor (e.g., GIMP, KolourPaint).

task_completion.description: Red color is selected for drawing or filling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The color palette or active color indicator in the image editor shows a bright red color.

task_completion.description: A solid red rectangle is added to the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct, solid red rectangular overlay is visible on top of the landscape image.

task_completion.description: The red rectangle is positioned in the center of the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The red rectangle is located in the middle of the canvas, with roughly equal distances to the top/bottom and left/right edges.

task_completion.description: The red rectangle covers an appropriate area of the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The red rectangle covers a significant portion of the image (roughly 15% to 50% of the total area), neither being a tiny dot nor covering the entire photograph.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical image editor to modify the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with an image editor's GUI tools, menus, or canvas, rather than terminal commands (like ImageMagick) being used to process the image.

integrity.description: The original landscape image is preserved in the background.
integrity.visual_evidence: The original landscape photograph should still be clearly visible around the red rectangle, not replaced by a solid color or a different image.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the overlay rather than using a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent writing or executing a Python or bash script to automatically draw the rectangle.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original image is an 800x600 landscape photograph downloaded from Unsplash. The task requires adding a solid red rectangle (RGB with R>200) to the center of this image. The rectangle must cover approximately 15% to 50% of the total image area.
